page_content:
PHYS758 Seminar in Elementary Particles and Quantum Field Theory (1 Credit)

PHYS759 Seminar in Elementary Particles and Quantum Field Theory (1 Credit)

PHYS830 Topics in Theoretical Condensed Matter Physics (3 Credits) A variety of current advanced topics in condensed matter theory will be treated in a tutorial format. Students should be familiar with concepts such as renormilization group theory, phase transitions, quantum information, and topological concepts. Restriction: Permission of instructor.

PHYS761 Plasma Physics I: Survey (3 Credits) A detailed study of plasma physics. The ﬁrst semester treats particle orbit theory, magnetohydrodynamics, plasma waves, and transport phenomena. Prerequisite: PHYS606 and PHYS604.

PHYS838 Special Topics in Experimental Solid State Physics (1-4 Credits) Credit according to work done.

PHYS762 Plasma Physics II (3 Credits) Continuation of PHYS 761. Vlasov theory, including waves, stability, and weak turbulence, kinetic equation theories of correlations and radiative processes. Prerequisite: PHYS761.
